policy: Candidate-bearing JSON artifacts must either be wired into the decision path, have a real state_ownership_map feed_path, or carry a justified non_surfacing_reason here. This file is for proof caches, audit artifacts, intermediate caches, fixtures, samples, and retired/deprecated artifacts only.

artifacts.non_surfacing_reason: Regression harness scenarios for trigger/sizing efficacy; they are test inputs, not live decision candidates.
Orphan-holding audit output; it informs follow-up review work but is not a direct Today/Decide candidate source.
Sample opportunity-signal payload for development/tests; live flow uses uw_opportunity_signals.json.
Summary/proof of source-call cache merge state; source_calls.json is the decision-path input.
Pre-merge/classification candidate cache; source_calls.json is the scored and surfaced decision-path artifact.
UW price-cache proof/summary artifact; live price facts surface through the built feed and gate/card context.
